examples: A cocktail of orange, roses, cinnamon, musk and ambergris, it is dispensed from a filigreed spoon filled from an eagle-shaped ampulla.
As the sky bruised, the temperature dropped to freezing and frost filigreed the tent.
They toy with the very idea of food how it is prepared, packaged, filigreed, tricked up, dramatized.
That makes it possible to create minutely filigreed structures, such as concentric rings and scaffolds.
